title: Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa Lyrics Anantha Poongatre
stanzas:
Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa Lyrics Anantha Poongatre

Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa
Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa

kannodu vazhum kalai maana
illai kan thondri
maraiyum poi maanaa

vennilaavin theevaa
aval vellai poovaa
kamban kaalidasan
sonna kadhal thaenaa

Irulai pinniya kuzhalo
iruvizhigal nilavin nizhalo
pon udhadugalin siru variyil
en uyirai pudhaipaalo

ravivarman thoorigai ezhutho
illai sangil ooriya kalutho
adhil otrai vervai thuliyaai
naan urundida maatteno

boomi konda poovaiyellam
iru bandhaai seidhadhu
yaar seyalo.

jannal oaviya chitridaiyo
aval selai kattiya siru puyalo
en penpaavai konda
pon kaalgal avai
manmadha thottathu
maragadha thoongal.

Avale en thunai aanaal
en aaviyai udaiyaai neivaen
aval maeniyil udaiyaai
thazhuvi pala melliya
idam thoduven.

margazhi maadhathu iravil
en maangani kulirgira
pozhuthil en swasathil
kanikindra soottai
en sundharikku parisalippen

mogam theerkkum
mudhal iravil.
oru maega meththai
naan tharuven

Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa
Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa
kannodu vazhum kalai maana
illai kan thondri
maraiyum poi maanaa

vennilaavin theevaa
aval vellai poovaa
kamban kaalidasan
sonna kadhal thaenaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa?

The song Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa expresses deep romantic feelings and longing, encapsulating the beauty of love.

In which movie is Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa featured?

The song is featured in the movie Anantha Poongatre.

Who is the singer of Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan.

Who composed the music for Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa?

The music for the song was composed by Deva.

When was Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa released?

The song was released on June 18, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa, the lyrics beautifully depict the emotions of love and longing, making it a perfect romantic ballad. The song captures the essence of the protagonist's dreams and desires, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery by Hariharan, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This timeless piece remains a favorite for romantic occasions, celebrating the beauty of relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With Anantha Poongatre as its backdrop, this song showcases the soulful voice of Hariharan, complemented by Deva's enchanting composition. Dive into a world of emotions as the lyrics weave a beautiful tale of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Chemmeenaa Vinmeenaa Lyrics Anantha Poongatre Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa
There is no art that lives with the eyes, the eyes are deceived and become false.
Is the tear a statue that can be felt? It will strike in my dreams.
In the moonlight, she is like a white flower, as Kamban and Kalidasa said, love is sweet.
In the shadow of the night, the two eyes are like the moon's light, in the small space of golden moments, my life is renewed.
Ravivarman did not write the letter, the village is filled with the sound of the flute, will I not roll in it like a flower?
Who has made the flower that holds the earth?
Is the window a painting? The small flower that she tied is my beloved's golden feet, they are touched by love's hand and sleep like emeralds.
She is my companion, but I will give my life to her, I will embrace her in my arms and touch many soft places.
In the month of Margazhi, in the night, my beloved is blooming, in my breath, the fragrance is coming to my beautiful one.
In the early night that ends the longing, I will give a big gift.
If the month comes in the second month, I will give a beautiful gift.
If she walks, it will be a celebration for the flowers that bloom in the pot.
Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa Chemmeenaa vinmeenaa, there is no art that lives with the eyes, the eyes are deceived and become false.
Is the tear a statue that can be felt? It will strike in my dreams.
In the moonlight, she is like a white flower, as Kamban and Kalidasa said, love is sweet.
